Family Ferrari Sunday · Updated route

Ferrari Terrace Loop

Starting from San Giovanni in Persiceto: reveal at 09:00, departure by 09:30, Lamborghini stop, proper lunch in Modena, Ferrari emotion in Maranello, then hill villages, coffee, gelato and golden-hour countryside.

09:00Car arrival & reveal
09:30Latest departure
ModenaProper lunch stop
20:00Return target

The revised rhythm

San Giovanni is now the starting point, not a coffee stop. The first real anchor is Sant’Agata for Lamborghini, then Modena becomes the proper lunch break. After lunch the route becomes more scenic and emotional: Castelvetro, Maranello, Savignano, Vignola, and the soft countryside return.

09:00–09:30San Giovanni in Persiceto

The reveal

The Ferrari arrives at 09:00. Use the first 30 minutes for the surprise, photos, roof-down moment and letting Tudor and David properly discover the car. Latest departure: 09:30.

PhotosRoof downBoys’ surprise
09:30–10:15First countryside drive

Leave San Giovanni in Persiceto

Since you are already in San Giovanni, do not spend the morning there. Leave by 09:30 and use the first easy countryside drive toward Sant’Agata Bolognese to let everyone settle into the Ferrari.

Easy first driveRoof downNo rush
Open in Maps
10:15–11:15Sant’Agata Bolognese

Lamborghini stop

Keep this as a short high-impact stop: museum or outside photos, depending on the boys’ appetite. The day should still be about open-air driving, villages and lunch in Modena, not standing inside too long.

LamborghiniPhoto stopShort visit
Open in Maps
11:45–13:45Modena

Proper lunch in Modena

This becomes the real lunch anchor of the day. Park outside the ZTL, walk into the historic centre, and do a relaxed lunch rather than eating randomly between stops. Modena gives everyone a reset: beautiful streets, good food, gelato, and a more elegant rhythm before the Ferrari part of the day.

LunchHistoric centrePark outside ZTLGelato
Open in Maps
14:15–15:10Castelvetro di Modena

Coffee, views and hill village walk

After lunch, this is the main village-beauty stop. Castelvetro gives you hill views, old stone streets, Piazza Roma and Lambrusco countryside. Park just outside the medieval centre, walk up, take coffee or dessert, and enjoy the scenery.

Best terrace stopViewsPiazza RomaVineyards
Open in Maps
15:30–16:30Maranello

Ferrari territory

This is the emotional peak: arriving in Maranello in a Ferrari. You can do the Ferrari Museum if the boys are fully into it, or simply take the factory-town photo stop and a quick espresso. Do not let it eat the whole afternoon.

Ferrari MuseumFactory atmosphereIconic photos
Open in Maps
17:00–17:35Savignano sul Panaro

Small fortified village

A short authentic stop: more intimate, less obvious, with stone streets and a fortified village feel. Ideal for a quick espresso, walk and photos without crowds.

Hidden gemMedieval streetsShort walk
Open in Maps
17:45–18:30Vignola

Rocca, gelato and family reset

Vignola gives you a comfortable late-afternoon stop: the Rocca, a proper town centre, gelato, and enough visual interest for the boys. It is a good reset before the final scenic drive back.

GelatoRocca di VignolaEasy family stop
Open in Maps
18:30–19:45Valsamoggia / Monteveglio

Golden-hour return

Return through Bazzano, Valsamoggia and the Monteveglio area if everyone still has energy. Keep this flexible: countryside, roof down, and the final stretch of the Ferrari day.

Golden hourCountrysideFlexible ending
Open in Maps

Driver’s note

Keep the first part disciplined: car at 09:00, photos and surprise, leave by 09:30. In Modena, avoid the ZTL and park outside the tight historical centre. The Ferrari experience is not speed — it is sound, scenery, villages, family theatre, and a proper Italian lunch.

Clean timeline

09:00Car arrives in San Giovanni in Persiceto / surprise reveal
09:30Latest departure from San Giovanni in Persiceto
10:15Sant’Agata Bolognese / Lamborghini stop
11:45Modena — proper lunch in the historic centre
14:15Castelvetro di Modena — coffee / views / village walk
15:30Maranello — Ferrari stop
17:00Savignano sul Panaro — small fortified village
17:45Vignola — gelato / castle / family reset
18:30Scenic return through Valsamoggia / Monteveglio
19:45–20:30Return and dinner near base

Clean repaired version · Real Ferrari photos embedded in the hero and reveal sections; San Giovanni scenery embedded in the first-drive section.
